name: Khaled Frayji
quote: Working together has been a genuinely great experience. Rami consistently showed professionalism, clear communication, and a strong sense of ownership over your work. What stood out most was his ability to translate ideas into practical results while staying open to feedback.

name: Sara Rashidi
quote: It was a pleasure working with Ramy, who demonstrated outstanding professionalism, solid technical expertise, and excellent public speaking and interpersonal skills throughout our collaboration.
